lines: The Fever beat the Mercury 86‑77 yesterday and will host them again at 7:30 PM tomorrow.
Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 points a game for the Fever, the third‑best scorer in the WNBA.
The Indians are 31‑44 and will face the RailRiders at 7:05 PM tonight.
The World Cup match Turkey vs United States is on Thursday at 10 PM.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Tuesday, June 23. The Fever beat the Mercury 86‑77 yesterday and will host them again at 7:30 PM tomorrow. Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 points a game for the Fever, the third‑best scorer in the WNBA. The Indians are 31‑44 and will face the RailRiders at 7:05 PM tonight. The World Cup match Turkey vs United States is on Thursday at 10 PM. And if it gets away from you, your out is: you follow this way closer than I do.
